author: codex
scope: Reduced the remaining metric_claim unit_family=other tail from 37 to 6 by normalizing employment scale units, named safety rate units, seats-per-car, and days-per-employee through exact or payload-gated deterministic rules.

constraints.mutation_path: deterministic normalizer/test changes plus bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize

subagents.role: read-only remaining metric other policy scout
subagents.finding_summary: Confirmed 30 of the 37 current metric other rows were stale relative to safe normalizer rules, endorsed the employment-scale/access convention, exact named safety-rate allowlist, seats-per-car, and days-per-employee rules, and recommended holding the six high-risk date/malformed/ambiguous rows.

rules.name: employment_scale_units
rules.guard: metric_name token includes employment and raw unit key is thousands, thousand_jobs, or millions_of_jobs
rules.rationale: Existing corpus convention maps jobs to unit_family access; exact employment metric names and units prove a jobs scale rather than a generic scale.

rules.name: named_safety_rate_units
rules.guard: raw unit key is rate and metric_name is lost_time_injury_rate, lost_time_incident_rate, or total_recordable_incident_rate
rules.rationale: Exact allowlist prevents broad raw rate normalization while classifying named safety-rate metrics.

rules.name: seats_per_car
rules.rationale: Self-describing numerator/denominator unit for railcar seating capacity.

rules.name: days_per_employee
rules.rationale: Self-describing duration denominator unit for employee availability.

intentionally_held: date-like year units for substantial completion and revenue-service target/forecast dates
individuals for outreach count because family could be engagement, participation, or population
2027 $M because the label mixes price year and cost-per-rider and should not become million-dollar scale
malformed agent-text unit containing 'wait, the table shows amounts in millions. Let me re-read.'

verification.focused_tests: bun test packages/pipeline/test/ontology/normalizers.test.ts: 276 pass, 0 fail, 4573 expect() calls
verification.materialize: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize completed; Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; retired skipped 243; SQLite FTS quick_check ok
verification.validate: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts validate: Issues 0; submissions 98102; canonical records 84040; wiki pages 7334

remaining_lanes: Metric unit_family other is now six intentionally-held records; further reduction likely needs date-unit representation policy, source-data repair, or manual submission override path rather than broad unit aliases.

Continue the direct post-ingest loop on a non-metric bucket with a larger measurable tail, such as source_gap kind residuals, event/source-gap policy holds, relation assertion-status unknowns, or entity/corridor duplicate pressure.
